vocab.meaning: tình trạng giao thông tắc nghẽn hoàn toàn
vocab.example: When the city is in a state of total gridlock, I usually try to remain calm and catch up on my favorite podcasts.

vocab.meaning: xe cộ nối đuôi nhau san sát (tắc đường)
vocab.example: Traffic is often bumper to bumper during rush hour, so I use that time to mentally plan my schedule for the day.

vocab.meaning: thử thách lòng kiên nhẫn của ai đó
vocab.example: Sitting in a stationary car for an hour really tests my patience, so I often listen to jazz to soothe my nerves.

vocab.meaning: bị kẹt ở đoạn đường thắt nút cổ chai
vocab.example: Whenever I'm stuck in a bottleneck, I take the opportunity to practice mindfulness and deep breathing.

vocab.meaning: hàng dài xe cộ nối đuôi nhau do tắc nghẽn
vocab.example: There was a five-mile tailback on the motorway, which gave me plenty of time to finish my audiobook.

vocab.meaning: lãng phí thời gian vào những việc vô bổ
vocab.example: Instead of frittering away time by scrolling through social media, I prefer learning a new language via mobile apps while waiting.
It is essential to keep your cool when traffic is moving at a snail's pace to avoid road rage.

vocab.meaning: một sự phiền toái không thể tránh khỏi
vocab.example: I've come to view traffic jams as an inevitable nuisance of urban life, so I try to make the most of the downtime.
I sometimes call a friend to vent my frustration, which actually helps the time pass much more quickly.

vocab.meaning: tìm kiếm các lộ trình thay thế
vocab.example: While waiting, I often consult GPS apps to seek alternative routes and bypass the heaviest congestion.
